summary: Paint Shop ship-ready testing complete. ALL features verified working: draggable text, full state persistence, all 6 truck models, color application with no background bleed, wrap patterns, extras toggles, save/reset functionality, and racing stripe bounds.
critical_code_review_comments: DraggableElement component working correctly - text can be repositioned via mouse drag
Racing stripe bounds properly confined to 12%-88% of canvas width (left: 12%, right: 12%)

Backend TruckDesign model includes all new fields: lettering_x, lettering_y, lettering_font, awning_color, lights_color, racing_stripe_color, racing_stripe_width, logo_x, logo_y, logo_scale, logo_rotation
Backend uses upsert pattern to update existing user design instead of creating duplicates
No watermark artifacts found on truck canvas
Background stays pure black (rgb(0,0,0)) when colors are applied - no bleed
test_credentials: No authentication required for Paint Shop features
seed_data_creation: Test truck designs created via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paint Shop ship-ready features all verified. Draggable text works via mousedown/mousemove/mouseup events. Racing stripe confined to truck body bounds. All 6 truck models load correctly. Backend persists all customization fields.

1_Paint_Shop_Loads.details: Paint Shop loads at /paint-shop with glassmorphism header, truck canvas on left, control panel on right

2_Color_Application.details: Color applied to truck body with NO background bleed - background stays pure black (rgb(0,0,0))

3_Draggable_Text.details: Text 'TACO FIESTA' entered, appears on truck, successfully dragged from x=560 to x=406 (repositioned)

4_Drag_Hint_Message.details: 'Drag text on the preview to reposition' message appears in Text tab after entering business name

5_All_6_Truck_Models.details: All 6 truck models (Classic Step Van, Modern Sprinter, Large Box Truck, Compact Transit, Retro Airstream, Open-Air Trailer) load correctly

6_Finish_Types.details: Matte, Gloss, Metallic, Chrome finishes all clickable and apply visual filter changes

7_Wrap_Patterns.details: Horizontal Stripes, Carbon Fiber, Polka Dots all show distinct patterns on truck body only (not on background)

8_Extras_Toggles.details: Racing Stripe, LED Underglow, Awning/Canopy, Roof Signage all toggle ON/OFF with visible effects

9_Racing_Stripe_Bounds.details: Racing stripe style confirms bounds: 'left: 12%; right: 12%' - confined to ~12% to 88% of canvas width

10_Save_Design.details: Save Design button works, toast shows 'Design saved successfully!'

11_Backend_POST_Full_Payload.details: POST /api/truck-designs with lettering_x, lettering_y, lettering_font, awning_color, lights_color, racing_stripe_color - all fields returned in response

12_Backend_GET_Latest.details: GET /api/truck-designs/latest returns saved design with all new fields in schema

13_Reset_Design.details: Reset Design button works, toast shows 'Design reset to defaults', truck returns to white/no accessories

14_No_Watermark.details: No 'PNG ALNG' watermark text visible on truck canvas
